testcase.classname: Products Routes GET /api/products should return paginated products list
testcase.name: Products Routes GET /api/products should return paginated products list

testcase.classname: Products Routes GET /api/products should filter by category
testcase.name: Products Routes GET /api/products should filter by category

testcase.classname: Products Routes GET /api/products should filter by search term
testcase.name: Products Routes GET /api/products should filter by search term

testcase.classname: Products Routes GET /api/products should filter by price range
testcase.name: Products Routes GET /api/products should filter by price range

testcase.classname: Products Routes GET /api/products should return pagination metadata
testcase.name: Products Routes GET /api/products should return pagination metadata

testcase.classname: Products Routes GET /api/products/categories should return list of categories
testcase.name: Products Routes GET /api/products/categories should return list of categories

testcase.classname: Products Routes GET /api/products/:id should return a product by valid ID
testcase.name: Products Routes GET /api/products/:id should return a product by valid ID

testcase.classname: Products Routes GET /api/products/:id should return 400 for invalid UUID format
testcase.name: Products Routes GET /api/products/:id should return 400 for invalid UUID format

testcase.classname: Products Routes GET /api/products/:id should return 404 for non-existent product
testcase.name: Products Routes GET /api/products/:id should return 404 for non-existent product

testcase.classname: Health Check Endpoints GET /health → 200 with healthy status
testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /health → 200 with healthy status

testcase.classname: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health → 200 with healthy status
testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health → 200 with healthy status

testcase.classname: Health Check Endpoints GET /api → 200 with API info
testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /api → 200 with API info

testcase.classname: Health Check Endpoints GET /nonexistent-route → 404
testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /nonexistent-route → 404

testcase.classname: Security Headers should include X-Content-Type-Options header
testcase.name: Security Headers should include X-Content-Type-Options header

testcase.classname: Security Headers should include X-Frame-Options header
testcase.name: Security Headers should include X-Frame-Options header

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should register a new user successfully
testcase.name: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should register a new user successfully

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should reject duplicate email registration
testcase.name: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should reject duplicate email registration

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should reject weak password
testcase.name: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should reject weak password

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should reject invalid email
testcase.name: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should reject invalid email

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should not expose password in response
testcase.name: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/register should not expose password in response

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/login should login with valid credentials
testcase.name: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/login should login with valid credentials

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/login should reject invalid password
testcase.name: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/login should reject invalid password

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/login should reject non-existent user
testcase.name: Authentication Routes POST /api/auth/login should reject non-existent user

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes GET /api/auth/me should return user profile with valid token
testcase.name: Authentication Routes GET /api/auth/me should return user profile with valid token

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes GET /api/auth/me should reject request without token
testcase.name: Authentication Routes GET /api/auth/me should reject request without token

testcase.classname: Authentication Routes GET /api/auth/me should reject request with invalid token
testcase.name: Authentication Routes GET /api/auth/me should reject request with invalid token
